name: HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL
description: HNS INCIDENT DETAIL. This table stores the incident event related data.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for the Incident detail.Primary key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Incident identifier. Primary key for Incidents Summary table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_EVENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier for each Incident Event. Connect to FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_VL to get Incident Events.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_EVENT_NO
columns.Comments: Unique user generated Incident Event Number.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_EVENT_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Owner identifier for an Incident Event. Owner is an employee.

columns.Name: INC_EVENT_OWNER_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment Id of the incident event owner.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Incident event completed flag. This signifies if the incident event is completed.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the incident event is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: INCI_EVENT_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: INCI_EVENT_STATUS_ID column: Current Incident Event Status. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP INCIDENT_STATUS.

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target completion date set for each incident event.

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual Completion date set per incident event.

columns.Name: SEVERITY_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Severity level set per incident event.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_EVENT_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: The Summary information entered by the reporter for each incident event.

columns.Name: INCI_DETAIL_DESCR
columns.Comments: Description for each incident event.

columns.Name: THIRD_PARTY_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Details per incident event from the third party.

columns.Name: NOTICE_OF_VIOLATION_CD
columns.Comments: Notice of violation sent per incident event.

columns.Name: SPILL_RELEASE_CODE
columns.Comments: Spill Release Identifier. This column is related to Spill / Release incident event type.

columns.Name: SPILLKIT_DEPLOYED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Spill kit deployed flag. This column is related to spill/release incident event.

columns.Name: CLEANUP_TEAM_NOTIFIED
columns.Comments: Cleanup team notified flag. This column is related to Spill/ Release incident event.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_SPILLED
columns.Comments: Amount in volume spilled during the incident.. This column is related to Spill/Relase incident event.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_SPILLED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Amount spilled.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_RECOVERED
columns.Comments: Amount in volume recovred during the event. This column is related to Spill/Release incident event.

columns.Name: AMOUNT_RECOVERED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Amount recovered.

columns.Name: PROPERTY_DAMAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Property damage type  identifier. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP PROPERTY_DAMAGE.

columns.Name: NEAR_MISS_CODE
columns.Comments: Near miss type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP NEAR_MISS.

columns.Name: UNSAFE_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Unsafe condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP UNSAFE CONDITION.

columns.Name: ROAD_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Road condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP ROAD CONDITION.

columns.Name: LIGHT_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Light condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP LIGHT_CONDITION.

columns.Name: TRAFFIC_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Traffic condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP TRAFFIC CONDITION.

columns.Name: WEATHER_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Weather condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP WEATHER CONDITION.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: INCIDENT_EVENT_DATE column : Date incident event was reported.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_STRUCK_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Struck code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEHICLE_STRUCK.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_COLLISION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Collision Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_COLLISION_TYPE.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_STRUCK_BY_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Struck by code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEHICLE_STRUCK_BY.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_ACC_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Accident Category code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_ACCIDENT_CATEGORY.

columns.Name: TRAFFIC_CONTROLS_CODE
columns.Comments: Traffic Controls code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_TRAFFIC_CONTROLS.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED_LIMIT
columns.Comments: Vehicle Speed Limit.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Vehicle Speed. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPEED_UOM.

columns.Name: POLICE_REPORT_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column signifies whether the Police Agency has been notified.

columns.Name: POLICE_AGENCY_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Police Agency Location.

columns.Name: POLICE_BADGE_NUM
columns.Comments: Police Badge Number.

columns.Name: CITATION_NUM
columns.Comments: Citation Number.

columns.Name: UNSAFE_ACT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Unsafe Act Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_UNSAFE_ACT_TYPE.

columns.Name: ISSUE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Issue Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_ISSUE_TYPE.

columns.Name: IMPROVEMENT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Improvement Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_IMPROVEMENT_TYPE.

columns.Name: LESSONS_LEARNED
columns.Comments: Lessons Learned.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID of the Employee.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the Employee.

columns.Name: AIR_QUALITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Air Quality Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_AIR_QUALITY_TYPE.

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Ergonomic Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_ERGONOMIC_TYPE.

columns.Name: ERGONOMIC_ASS_REQ_CODE
columns.Comments: Request an Ergonomic Assessment. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: RESULT_CODE
columns.Comments: Result Code Column : Incident Owner check result code.

columns.Name: ACTION_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Action Required Flag Column : Check box to confirm whether an action is required.

columns.Name: EVENT_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date incident event was created in the system.

columns.Name: WHAT_WAS_SPILLED_OR_RELEASED
columns.Comments: What was spilled or released.

columns.Name: CLEANUP_TEAM_NOTIFIED_AT
columns.Comments: At what time Cleanup team or Contractor notified.

columns.Name: SPILL_POSSIBLE_CAUSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Possible cause of the spill or release. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPILL_POSSIBLE_CAUSE.

columns.Name: SPILL_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Spill or release source. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPILL_SOURCE.

columns.Name: REPLN_SPILL_KIT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Replenish Spill Kit Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: DATE_DISCLOSED
columns.Comments: Date Disclosed Column : Date employee notified the organization about the event.
